arxiv_papers.snippet: Earth's magnetic field is generated by fluid motion in the liquid-metal core and has been active for billions of year. arxiv_papers.title: Towards imaging Earth's large-scale structures by directional geoneutrino detection with Ocean Bottom Detector
arxiv_papers.snippet: Geoneutrinos, electron antineutrinos produced by radioactive decays of heat-producing elements (HPEs) within the Earth, provide unique insights into Earth's interior and heat budget since their first detection in 2005 by KamLAND.
